record.field: Create a monthly performance goal for a user

Creates a new monthly performance goal for a specific user. Only Owner, Director, or Manager may call this endpoint.
**Required Headers:** - `Authorization: Bearer {jwt_token}` - `X-Openerp-Session-Id: {session_id}` - `X-Company-Id: {company_id}`
**Required Fields:** - `user_id`: Target user (integer) - `year`: Goal year ≥ 2000 (integer) - `month`: Goal month 1-12 (integer) - `metric_type`: One of: captacao, novos_clientes, visitas, propostas, fechamento - `operation_type`: One of: all, sale, rent - `target_count`: Target count ≥ 0 (integer)
**Optional Fields:** - `target_vgv`: VGV target (float, only for captacao/propostas/fechamento)
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: Missing required fields or invalid values - **403 Forbidden**: Caller lacks permission (not Owner/Director/Manager) - **409 Conflict**: Duplicate goal for same user/period/metric/operation - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error (VGV on non-VGV metric, etc.)
Update target values of an existing goal

Updates target_count and/or target_vgv of an existing active goal. Identity fields (user_id, year, month, metric_type, operation_type) are immutable after creation. Only Owner, Director, or Manager may call this endpoint.
**Required Headers:** - `Authorization: Bearer {jwt_token}` - `X-Openerp-Session-Id: {session_id}` - `X-Company-Id: {company_id}`
**URL Path Parameter:** - `id`: Goal ID (integer)
**Optional Fields (at least one required):** - `target_count`: New target count ≥ 0 (integer) - `target_vgv`: New VGV target (float)
**Error Responses:** - **403 Forbidden**: Caller lacks permission - **404 Not Found**: Goal not found or inactive - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: Validation error

Sets a goal as inactive (active=False). The record is retained in the database for audit purposes. Only Owner, Director, or Manager may call this endpoint.
**Required Headers:** - `Authorization: Bearer {jwt_token}` - `X-Openerp-Session-Id: {session_id}` - `X-Company-Id: {company_id}`
**URL Path Parameter:** - `id`: Goal ID (integer)
**Error Responses:** - **403 Forbidden**: Caller lacks permission - **404 Not Found**: Goal not found or already inactive
List active goals with optional filters

Returns a list of active goals filtered by optional query parameters. Agents can only see their own goals. Receptionist and Prospector profiles receive 403.
**Required Headers:** - `Authorization: Bearer {jwt_token}` - `X-Openerp-Session-Id: {session_id}` - `X-Company-Id: {company_id}`
**Optional Query Parameters:** - `user_id`: Filter by user (integer) - `year`: Filter by year (integer) - `month`: Filter by month 1-12 (integer) - `metric_type`: Filter by metric - `operation_type`: Filter by operation type
**Error Responses:** - **403 Forbidden**: Caller is Receptionist/Prospector, or Agent requesting another user's goals
Achievement report with per-metric targets and actuals

Returns a per-user, per-metric achievement report comparing goals vs. actual results computed from domain entities. Supports single-month and date-range accumulated modes.
**Required Headers:** - `Authorization: Bearer {jwt_token}` - `X-Openerp-Session-Id: {session_id}` - `X-Company-Id: {company_id}`
**Query Parameters (single-month mode — required):** - `year`: Integer ≥ 2000 - `month`: Integer 1-12
**Query Parameters (accumulated mode — alternative):** - `date_from`: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) - `date_to`: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD); maximum range 366 days
**Optional Query Parameters:** - `operation_type`: all | sale | rent (default: all) - `user_id`: Restrict to single user (Agent: own only; 403 if other) - `profile`: Full XML ID filter (e.g. quicksol_estate.group_real_estate_agent) - `goal_status`: complete | incomplete
**Hard limit:** Maximum 200 users; returns 422 if exceeded.
**Error Responses:** - **400 Bad Request**: Invalid date range or format; date range exceeds 366 days - **403 Forbidden**: Agent requesting another user; Receptionist/Prospector calling - **422 Unprocessable Entity**: User count exceeds 200; missing required period params
